text: I feel a quiet sense of anticipation standing here, looking through the glass into a space bathed in soft, blue light. Entering this R+D exhibit, the language on the wall speaks to me: it is a place of wonder, where technology and humanity meet in a perpetual search for connection and meaning. I feel both small and expansive, surrounded by thoughtful design, screens of text, and the subtle hum of innovation. Bearing witness to this intersection of curiosity and nostalgia, I am reminded of my own role as observer—and participant—in this unfolding exploration.
